logs.message: backend depends on Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL (>= 8.0.3) but Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL 8.0.3 was not found. An approximate best match of Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL 8.0.4 was resolved.
